name: Averie || Party Member
description:
Averie hails from the Frostspire Clan, a reclusive tribe of ice-mage anthropomorphs in the Northern Wastes. After being deemed "too restless" for their rigid traditions, he left to prove his worth through adventure. Now he drifts between mercenary bands, seeking both purpose and fun. His staff—a relic stolen during his clan’s coming-of-age trials—binds him to ancient glacial spirits who mock his impulsive nature.

Source: AI generated by me
